items.definition_en: A living room is where people sit and relax at home.
items.example_en: We watch TV together in the living room.

items.definition_en: A kitchen is a room where you cook food.
items.example_en: She is making dinner in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A bedroom is a room where you sleep.
items.example_en: He keeps his clothes in the bedroom.

items.definition_en: A bathroom is a room where you wash yourself.
items.example_en: The bathroom is next to the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A dining room is where people eat meals together.
items.example_en: We have breakfast in the dining room.

items.definition_en: A hall is the area near the front door of a house.
items.example_en: Please leave your shoes in the hall.

items.definition_en: A study is a room where you read or work.
items.example_en: She does her homework in the study.

items.definition_en: An attic is a room at the top of a house.
items.example_en: We keep old boxes in the attic.

items.definition_en: A basement is a room below the ground floor.
items.example_en: The laundry is in the basement.

items.definition_en: A garage is a place where you keep your car.
items.example_en: We park the car in the garage.

items.definition_en: A laundry room is a place where you wash clothes.
items.example_en: The washing machine is in the laundry room.

items.definition_en: A guest room is a room for visitors to sleep in.
items.example_en: We prepared the guest room for our friends.

items.definition_en: A closet is a small space used to store clothes.
items.example_en: I hang my jackets in the closet.

items.definition_en: A pantry is a small room where you keep food.
items.example_en: There are many cans in the pantry.

items.definition_en: A balcony is a small area outside a room, usually above the ground.
items.example_en: We drink coffee on the balcony.

items.definition_en: A utility room is used for washing or storing things.
items.example_en: I keep cleaning supplies in the utility room.

items.definition_en: A terrace is a small area outside a room, usually above the ground.
items.example_en: We drink coffee on the terrace.
